title: How would you react ifAsuka made demands
display_title: How would you react ifAsuka made demands
wikitext:
[]: How would you react if...[Asuka made demands] Post by Grimmjow » Wed May 01, 2013 2:17 pm Asuka came up to you and demanded that you look at her and hold her. [URL=http://www.zerochan.net/544869] [/URL]

[]: Post by Dream » Wed May 01, 2013 2:22 pm I would hold her.

[]: Post by EVAfacepalm » Wed May 01, 2013 2:24 pm Look at her and hold her... Long enough for the men in white coats to arrive and take her away.

[]: Post by Katana » Wed May 01, 2013 2:32 pm I NEED SUM1 2 HOLD ME ALREAYD.

[]: Post by Dream » Wed May 01, 2013 2:38 pm Katana wrote: I NEED SUM1 2 HOLD ME ALREAYD.

[]: Post by Katana » Wed May 01, 2013 2:43 pm I'd rather get hugged by an Angel than a loser.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Wed May 01, 2013 2:43 pm I would hold her, then invite the other Eva pilots for a group hug. They certainly need it.

[]: Post by Paranoid » Wed May 01, 2013 2:55 pm Asuka would never accept the hug if you were also hugging Rei and Shinji. She'd disengage immediately.

[]: Post by Katana » Wed May 01, 2013 2:55 pm Paranoid wrote: Asuka would never accept the hug if you were also hugging Rei and Shinji. She'd disengage immediately.

[]: Post by Justacrazyguy » Wed May 01, 2013 2:58 pm I would say: I´m sorry, but no.

[]: Post by KingXanaduu » Wed May 01, 2013 2:59 pm I'd ask: "If you bite me, will I turn into you?"

[]: Post by Katana » Wed May 01, 2013 3:02 pm Justacrazyguy wrote: I would say: I´m sorry, but no.

[]: Post by Elect G-Max » Wed May 01, 2013 3:36 pm I would comply, wait 5-10 seconds, and then ask her if she knows where Rei is.

[]: Post by TheFriskyIan » Wed May 01, 2013 3:48 pm I'd tell Asuka to get lost, she's mean and I don't like her. If she wasn't so crabby I would be nice and meet her demands though.

[]: Post by Lavinius » Wed May 01, 2013 3:51 pm I would look at her and hold her, of course!

[]: Post by Paranoid » Wed May 01, 2013 3:55 pm Honestly I'd hold her. I probably need it as much as she does.

[]: Post by Chuckman » Wed May 01, 2013 3:55 pm Squee! ...wait, is she still 14? I'm too pretty for jail.

[]: Post by Dovah » Wed May 01, 2013 3:56 pm I'd run.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed May 01, 2013 4:03 pm This thread lacks substance and serves no purpose.

[]: Post by Katana » Wed May 01, 2013 2:32 pm I NEED SUM
